summary: Iteration 68 - NeXify AI Chat Fixes & Agent CRUD UI Testing. ALL BACKEND TESTS PASSED (13/13). Fixed UI bug where 'Neuer Agent' button didn't show the form. Verified: 1) Chat scroll containment (messages scroll, not parent), 2) Ref-based streaming (no flickering), 3) Agent CRUD via UI and API, 4) Master Agent protection (37 tools, cannot delete).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, test agents cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All fixes verified. Chat scroll containment working (overflow-y:auto on .nxai-messages, overflow:hidden on .adm-content--fullbleed). Ref-based streaming prevents flickering. Agent CRUD UI fixed - added showAgentForm state variable to properly control form visibility.

chat_scroll_containment.details: .nxai-messages has overflow-y:auto, .adm-content--fullbleed has overflow:hidden and padding:0
chat_scroll_containment.test_result: Messages container scrolls independently, parent does not scroll

ref_based_streaming.details: nxStreamRef.current.textContent updated directly via nxUpdateStream(), bypassing React state
ref_based_streaming.test_result: Streaming div appeared during message send, no flickering observed

animation_iteration_fix.test_result: All messages have animation-iteration-count=1, no re-animation on re-render

endpoints_tested: GET /api/admin/nexify-ai/agents - Returns agents list with master

agent_crud_ui.details: Fixed bug where 'Neuer Agent' button didn't show form. Added showAgentForm state variable.
agent_crud_ui.test_result: Form appears on button click, can create/edit/delete agents via UI

master_agent_display.details: Master Agent card shows: 37 Tools, 'active' status, 'Master' badge
master_agent_display.test_result: All elements visible in Agents view

execute_tool_api.test_result: execute_shell with 'echo hello' returns stdout='hello', exit_code=0

bug_fixed.description: 'Neuer Agent' button didn't show the agent creation form
bug_fixed.root_cause: Form visibility condition (nxEditAgent !== null || nxAgentForm.name !== '') was false when button reset both to null/empty
bug_fixed.fix: Added showAgentForm state variable to explicitly control form visibility. Button now sets showAgentForm=true and nxEditAgent='new'

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Arcee AI trinity-large-preview, mem0 Brain)

playwright_test_results.admin_login_flow: PASS - Email → Role Selection → Password → Dashboard
playwright_test_results.chat_message_send: PASS - Message sent, streaming response received
playwright_test_results.master_agent_display: PASS - 37 Tools, active status, Master badge visible
playwright_test_results.agent_form_visibility: PASS (after fix) - Form appears on 'Neuer Agent' click
playwright_test_results.agent_create: PASS - Test Agent UI created successfully
playwright_test_results.agent_delete: PASS - Test Agent UI deleted successfully

console_warnings: React Router Future Flag Warning (v7_startTransition) - Not a bug, just deprecation notice
CORS error for ipapi.co/json - External service, not critical
